lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: darasan kau lochai sabh koee |
lines.english: Everyone longs for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag paraapat hoee | rahaau |
lines.english: By perfect destiny, it is obtained. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਆਮ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਤਜਿ ਨੀਦ ਕਿਉ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: siaam sundar taj need kiau aaee |
lines.english: Forsaking the Beautiful Lord, how can they go to sleep?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹਾ ਕਰਤ ਕਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: prem bichhohaa karat kasaaee |
lines.english: This butcher has separated them from the Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮੋਹਨੀ ਦੂਤਾ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mahaa mohanee dootaa laaee |1|
lines.english: The great enticer Maya has led them down the path of sin. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਦੈ ਜੰਤੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਇਆ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: niradai jant tis deaa na paaee |2|
lines.english: This merciless one shows no mercy at all to the poor beings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜਨਮ ਬੀਤੀਅਨ ਭਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: anik janam beeteean bharamaaee |
lines.english: Countless lifetimes have passed away, wandering aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਨ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੁਤਰ ਮਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghar vaas na devai dutar maaee |3|
lines.english: The terrible, treacherous Maya does not even allow them to dwell in their own home. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਅਪਨਾ ਕੀਆ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: din rain apanaa keea paaee |
lines.english: Day and night, they receive the rewards of their own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sun saajan sant jan bhaaee |
lines.english: Listen, O Friend, O Saint, O humble Sibling of Destiny:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਦੀਜੈ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਭਵਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kis dos na deejai kirat bhavaaee |4|
lines.english: Don't blame anyone else; your own actions lead you astray. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੫॥੩੪॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: charan saran naanak gat paaee |5|34|40|
lines.english: in the Sanctuary of the Lord's Feet, Nanak has found Salvation. ||5||34||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੀ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਛਾਪਰੀ ਜਾ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhalee suhaavee chhaaparee jaa meh gun gaae |
lines.english: Even a crude hut is sublime and beautiful, if the Lord's Praises are sung within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤ ਹੀ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਧਉਲਹਰ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kit hee kaam na dhaulahar jit har bisaraae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those mansions where the Lord is forgotten are useless. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ਏਹੁ ਬਡਪਨਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਲਪਟਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jal jaau ehu baddapanaa maaeaa lapattaae |1|
lines.english: This worldly glory might just as well burn; it only traps the mortals in Maya. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦੁ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: anad gareebee saadhasang jit prabh chit aae |
lines.english: Even poverty is bliss, if God comes to mind in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਰਾਜੁ ਨ ਕਿਤੈ ਕਾਜਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਨਹ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aiso raaj na kitai kaaj jit neh tripataae |2|
lines.english: Even empires are of no use at all, if they do not bring satisfaction. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਗਨ ਫਿਰਤ ਰੰਗਿ ਏਕ ਕੈ ਓਹੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nagan firat rang ek kai ohu sobhaa paae |
lines.english: Someone may wander around naked, but if he loves the One Lord, he receives honor and respect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਸਨੁ ਪੀਸਿ ਓਢਿ ਕਾਮਰੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੰਤੋਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: peesan pees odt kaamaree sukh man santokhaae |
lines.english: One may have to grind corn, and wear a coarse blanket, but still, one can find peace of mind and contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੁਮੑਰੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tumarai haath prabh aap kare karaae |
lines.english: Everything is in Your Hands, God. You Yourself are the Doer, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਟ ਪਟੰਬਰ ਬਿਰਥਿਆ ਜਿਹ ਰਚਿ ਲੋਭਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: paatt pattanbar birathiaa jih rach lobhaae |3|
lines.english: Silk and satin clothes are worthless, if they lead to greed. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਨੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: saas saas simarat rahaa naanak daan paae |4|1|41|
lines.english: With each and every breath, may I continue to remember You. Please, bless Nanak with this gift. ||4||1||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤ ਸੁਤ ਸਗਲ ਤੇ ਜੀਅ ਹੂੰ ਤੇ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee meet sut sagal te jeea hoon te piaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is dearer to me than all my siblings, friends and children. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸੰਤੁ ਪਰਾਨ ਧਨ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਪਨਿਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa sant paraan dhan tis kaa panihaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord's Saint is my life and wealth. I am his water-carrier.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਸੁ ਨਿਹਾਰਉ ਚਰਣ ਤਲਿ ਧੂਰਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sees nihaarau charan tal dhoor mukh laavau |1|
lines.english: I bow my head low, to touch his feet, and apply his dust to my face. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਸਾ ਕਾ ਕਰਿ ਬੀਜਨਾ ਸੰਤ ਚਉਰੁ ਢੁਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: kesaa kaa kar beejanaa sant chaur dtulaavau |
lines.english: I make my hair into a fan, and wave it over the Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਰਉ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taj abhimaan saranee prau har gun nidh paaee |2|
lines.english: Renouncing egotism, I enter His Sanctuary. I have found the Lord, the treasure of virtue. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਸਟ ਬਚਨ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਕਰਉ ਦੀਨ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: misatt bachan benatee krau deen kee niaaee |
lines.english: I offer my prayer with sweet words, in sincere humility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਲੋਕਨ ਪੁਨਹ ਪੁਨਹ ਕਰਉ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: avalokan punah punah krau jan kaa darasaar |
lines.english: I gaze upon the Blessed Vision of the Lord's humble servant, again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਚਨ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਿੰਚਉ ਬੰਦਉ ਬਾਰ ਬਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amrit bachan man meh sinchau bandau baar baar |3|
lines.english: I cherish and gather in His Ambrosial Words within my mind; time and time again, I bow to Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਵਉ ਮਨਿ ਆਸਾ ਕਰਉ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਸੰਗੁ ਮਾਗਉ ॥
lines.translit: chitvau man aasaa krau jan kaa sang maagau |
lines.english: In my mind, I wish, hope and beg for the Society of the Lord's humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਦਾਸ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਉ ॥੪॥੨॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kau prabh deaa kar daas charanee laagau |4|2|42|
lines.english: Be Merciful to Nanak, O God, and lead him to the feet of Your slaves. ||4||2||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਮੋਹੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਖੰਡ ਤਾਹੂ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin mohe brahamandd khandd taahoo meh paau |
lines.english: She has enticed the worlds and solar systems; I have fallen into her clutches.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਇਹੁ ਬਿਖਈ ਜੀਉ ਦੇਹੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raakh lehu ihu bikhee jeeo dehu apunaa naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Lord, please save this corrupt soul of mine; please bless me with Your Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋ ਸੁਖੀ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te naahee ko sukhee taa kai paachhai jaau |
lines.english: She has not brought anyone peace, but still, I chase after her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਜੋ ਸਗਲ ਕਉ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਲਪਟਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chhodd jaeh jo sagal kau fir fir lapattaau |1|
lines.english: She forsakes everyone, but still, I cling to her, again and again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੨॥੩॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kee prabh benatee saadhasang samaau |2|3|43|
lines.english: This is Nanak's prayer, O Lord, that he may join and merge with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||3||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੁਣਾਪਤੇ ਤੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karahu kripaa karunaapate tere har gun gaau |
lines.english: Have Mercy on me, O Lord of Compassion; please let me sing Your Glorious Praises, O Lord.
